```

```js

```

### 3. Input validation (for when routes accept input)

- **`helmet`** — sets safe default HTTP headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.).

const rateLimit = require('express-rate-limit');
app.use(helmet());

```

### 7. Graceful shutdown
Capture the server handle and close it on `SIGTERM`/`SIGINT` so in-flight requests finish cleanly:
```js

['SIGTERM', 'SIGINT'].forEach(sig => process.on(sig, () => server.close(() => process.exit(0))));
